title: Dressrosa’s Hidden System Emerges
description: Pages 13–13 focus on dressrosa’s hidden system emerges, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the characters active in this scene.
scene: This part follows Unknown person #14, Unknown person #17, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #21, Unknown person #22, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #8 as law moves toward the Caesar exchange at Green Bit while Luffy is drawn deeper into the Colosseum’s violent tournament.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Should we deal with Bellamy first!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: That's right!! He seems like he'll be a nuisance, so we should crush him before the numbers start thinning!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: The Stageis Setinfor A Fierce BATE!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #21
dialogue.text: Can't call this much of a battle royal

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #22
dialogue.text: You can cry about how unfair we are as much as you want once you're dead, Gamahaha!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #22
dialogue.text: Only one Survivor will be crowned winner. All that matters is that final result!!

summary: Pages 13–13 focus on dressrosa’s hidden system emerges, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the characters active in this scene.
